creator: raimeetravel
caption:
One of my favorite eurotrips last year was my first time in this city… MADRID 🇪🇸 ! I had been to Spain many times before but never made it a priority and now I’ll probably never visit without stopping through here. It’s such an amazing city for food, culture, art and even nature! 

Here’s a list of my favorite places to eat & explore 👇 

☕️ Coffee + churros:
• Chocolatería San Ginés
• Wolføx
• Alchemy Coffee

🍤 Favorite eats:
• Manifesto 13
• Casa Lucio
• Juana La Loca
• Casa Revuelta
• El Tigre
• Bodega de la Ardosa

🌳 Favorite areas to wander:
• Retiro Park
• La Latina
• Salamanca
• Chueca
• Malasaña

Have you been? @visita_madrid has a ton of great tips for your visit too!!

Where is a city you could revisit over and over?!

#madrid #spaintravel #madridfood

transcription.text: this is a european city i would go back to time and time again because it is that good it's madrid spain and here's how i would spend my time there so if you're planning a trip save this if you're not planning one yet this is why you should okay so first thing the key to having a great time in madrid is start your morning slow just grab a coffee and walk around it's one of those cities that's better when you're not rushing around checking things off of the list then i would pick one cultural stop for the day either the museo del prado or the reina sofia museum you really don't need to do both in one day after that go to el retiro park you can walk around sit by the water maybe grab a snack then in the evening just wander there are some incredible food places all around madrid these are some of my favorites also super fun to just hop between places grab drinks grab tapas that's really the best way to do madrid keep it simple follow your appetite and let the day unfold it's one of the best places for culture and food in europe so save this for your trip and tell me a city that you would visit over and over again
